nodes.name: Webhook — Meta WA Incoming
nodes.notes:
Paste URL ini ke Meta WA webhook settings.
Format Meta: { entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0] }

nodes.name: Respond 200 to Meta
nodes.notes: Meta butuh 200 OK dalam <1 detik, jadi respond dulu baru proses

nodes.name: Groq — Classify Intent
nodes.notes:
Credentials: HTTP Header Auth
Name: Authorization
Value: Bearer gsk_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
(API Key dari https://console.groq.com)

nodes.name: Send WA Reply
nodes.notes:
Credentials: httpHeaderAuth
Name: Authorization
Value: Bearer YOUR_WA_ACCESS_TOKEN

nodes.name: Notify Dashboard
nodes.notes:
Ganti URL dengan domain dashboard Anda.
Endpoint ini di-handle oleh React app.

nodes.name: Trigger Workflow 2 — Estimator
nodes.notes: Trigger workflow 2 dengan data extracted dari classifier
